privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.committed: We're committed to protecting your personal information. If you have any questions or concerns, our dedicated privacy team is here to help.

sections.intro: At Beldify, we take your privacy very seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and protect your information when you visit our website at www.beldify.com, including any other media format, media channel, mobile website, or mobile application related or connected to Beldify.
sections.infoWeCollectDescription: We collect information you provide directly, information we collect automatically when you interact with our website, and information from third-party sources.
sections.personalDataDescription: When you register an account, request a product, or participate in our community, we may collect:
personalDataItems: Your name, address, and phone number
Your account information (password, security code, etc.)
sections.usageDataDescription: We collect information about how you use our website, including:
usageDataItems: Your IP address and location data
howWeUseItems: Communicate with you about your orders
sections.authServicesDescription: We use third-party services for login (such as Google, Facebook). These services collect your information according to their privacy policies.
sections.dataStorageDescription: We use security measures to protect your data, but no system is 100% secure. We use SSL encryption and follow industry security standards.
sections.infoSharingDescription: We do not sell or give your information to third parties except in the following cases:
infoSharingItems: With service providers who help us provide our services
To comply with the law or a court order
In case of a merger or acquisition
sections.cookiesDescription: We use cookies and tracking technologies to improve your experience and analyze website usage. You can control your settings through your browser.
yourRightsItems: Object to the processing of your data
Request the transfer of your data
sections.yourRightsContact: To exercise these rights, please contact us through our Contact Us page.
sections.childrenPrivacyDescription: Our services are not directed at children under 16. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us.
sections.internationalTransfersDescription: Your information may be transferred to and stored in countries other than your own. When your information is transferred internationally, we use appropriate safeguards to protect it in accordance with this Privacy Policy and applicable law.
sections.changesDescription: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the 'Last updated' date. We encourage you to review our Privacy Policy regularly.
sections.contactInfoDescription: If you have any questions about our Privacy Policy, you can contact us at:

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.clarification: If you have any questions about our terms or need clarification on any policy, our customer support team is available to assist you.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.customerService: Our customer service team is here to help. Reach out to us with any questions or concerns.
contact.thankYou: Thank you! Your message has been sent successfully.
contact.subject: Subject

shipping.title: Shipping Information
shipping.subtitle: Everything you need to know about shipping your order
shipping.trackingText: Once your order ships, you will receive a confirmation email with your tracking number and a link to track your package.
shipping.orderUpdates: You can also view order updates in your account under 'Order History'.
shipping.processingText: Orders are processed within 1-2 business days after payment confirmation.
shipping.backorderedItems: Backordered items will be shipped separately when they become available.
shipping.estimatesText: Delivery times are estimates and begin from the date of shipping, not the date of order.
shipping.delaysText: Delivery times may be affected by customs processing for international shipments.

questions.question: How can I track my order?
questions.answer: You will receive a tracking number via email once your order has shipped. You can also track your order in your account under 'Order History'.

questions.question: Do you ship internationally?
questions.answer: Yes, we ship to most countries. International shipping costs and delivery times vary by location.

questions.question: Can I change my shipping address after placing an order?
questions.answer: Address changes can only be accommodated if the order has not yet been processed. Please contact our customer service team immediately if you need to change your shipping address.

questions.question: What if my package is lost or damaged?
questions.answer: If your package is lost or arrives damaged, please contact our customer service team within 48 hours of the delivery date for assistance.

shipping.helpText: Our customer service team is ready to assist you with any questions about your shipment.

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our products and services
faqs.contactText: If you couldn't find the answer to your question, our support team is always ready to help.

general.question: What is Beldify?
general.answer: Beldify is an online marketplace specializing in traditional and modern Moroccan fashion and accessories. We connect artisans and designers with customers around the world, offering authentic, high-quality products.

general.question: Where are you located?
general.answer: Our headquarters are in Tetouan, Morocco, but we ship to customers worldwide.

general.question: How do I contact customer service?
general.answer: You can reach our customer service team by email at support@beldify.com, by phone at +212 (0) 7 08 15 03 51, or through our Contact page.

general.question: What languages do you support?
general.answer: Our website is available in English and Arabic. Our customer service team speaks English, Arabic, and French.

account.question: How do I create an account?
account.answer: You can create an account by clicking on the 'Register' button in the top right corner of our website. You'll need to provide your email address and create a password, or you can sign up using your Google account.

account.question: Can I shop without creating an account?
account.answer: Yes, you can browse and shop as a guest. However, creating an account allows you to track orders, save favorite products, and enjoy a faster checkout process.

account.question: How can I track my order?
account.answer: Once your order is shipped, you'll receive a confirmation email with tracking information. You can also view your order status in your account under 'Order History'.

account.question: How do I reset my password?
account.answer: You can reset your password by clicking on 'Forgot Password' on the login page. We'll send you an email with instructions to create a new password.

products.question: How can I find my size?
products.answer: We provide detailed size guides for all our clothing items. You can find the size guide link on each product page. For traditional Moroccan clothing, we recommend checking our comprehensive Size Guide page.

products.question: Are your products handmade?
products.answer: Many of our products are handmade by skilled Moroccan artisans. Each product description specifies whether the item is handmade or machine-made.

products.question: Can I request custom measurements?
products.answer: Yes, for many traditional garments, we offer custom tailoring services. Look for the 'Custom Size' option on eligible product pages, or contact us for more information.

products.question: What materials are used in your products?
products.answer: We use a variety of traditional and modern materials. Each product description includes detailed information about the materials used.

payments.question: What payment methods do you accept?
payments.answer: We accept credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, and local payment options for customers in Morocco.

payments.question: Is it safe to use my credit card on your website?
payments.answer: Yes, our website uses SSL encryption to protect your payment information. We do not store your full credit card details on our servers.

payments.question: When will I be charged for my order?
payments.answer: Your payment is processed immediately when you place your order.

payments.question: Do you offer installment payment options?
payments.answer: Currently, we do not offer installment payment options, but we're working on adding this feature in the future.

returns.question: What is your return policy?
returns.answer: We offer a 30-day return policy for most items. Custom-made and personalized items cannot be returned unless there is a manufacturing defect. Please see our Returns page for complete details.

returns.question: How do I initiate a return?
returns.answer: To initiate a return, go to your account, find the order, and select 'Return Items'. Follow the instructions to generate a return shipping label and return authorization.

returns.question: Who pays for return shipping?
returns.answer: Return shipping costs are the responsibility of the customer, except in cases of defective items or shipping errors on our part.

returns.question: How long does it take to process a refund?
returns.answer: Once we receive your return, it typically takes 5-7 business days to process and issue a refund to your original payment method.

returns.title: Returns & Refunds
returns.subtitle: Our policy and process for returns and refunds

returnsPolicy.title: Returns Policy
returnsPolicy.policy1: We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. If you're not satisfied, you may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund or exchange.
returnsPolicy.policy2: To be eligible for a return, your item must be unused and in the same condition that you received it. It must also be in the original packaging with all tags attached.

refunds.title: Refunds
refunds.description: Once we receive your return, we will inspect it and notify you that we have received your returned item. We will immediately notify you on the status of your refund after inspecting the item.
refunds.timeline: Refunds will be processed within 3-5 business days after we receive your return. The refund will be credited to your original method of payment.

returns.standardItems: Standard products may be returned within 30 days of delivery, provided they are unused, unworn, and in their original packaging with all tags attached.
returns.intimateItems: Intimate apparel, undergarments, and swimwear (for hygiene reasons)
returns.saleItems: Items marked as 'Final Sale' or purchased at a significant discount (over 50%)
returns.step1: 1. Log in to your account and navigate to 'Order History'.
returns.step2: 2. Find the order containing the item(s) you wish to return and click 'Return Items'.
returns.step3: 3. Select the items you want to return and the reason for your return.
returns.step4: 4. Print the return shipping label and return authorization form.
returns.step5: 5. Pack the item(s) securely in their original packaging, if possible.
returns.step6: 6. Attach the shipping label to the package and drop it off at the specified carrier location.
returns.notLoggedIn: If you checked out as a guest, please contact our customer service with your order number to initiate a return.
returns.inspectionText: Once we receive your return, we'll inspect the item(s) to ensure they meet our return eligibility requirements.
returns.refundTimeText: Approved refunds will be processed within 5-7 business days and issued to your original payment method.
returns.shippingCostText: Original shipping costs are non-refundable unless the return is due to our error (defective item, wrong item shipped, etc.).
returns.exchangeProcess: To exchange an item for a different size or color, please follow the same process as returns, but select 'Exchange' instead of 'Return' and specify your preferred replacement.
returns.availabilityText: Exchanges are subject to availability. If your preferred replacement is unavailable, we'll issue a refund instead.
returns.defectiveProcess: If you receive a defective or damaged item, please contact us within 48 hours of delivery with photos of the defect/damage.
returns.defectiveReturn: We will provide a prepaid return shipping label for defective items, and you can choose between a replacement or a full refund, including original shipping costs.
returns.internationalText: International customers are responsible for return shipping costs and any applicable customs duties or taxes incurred during the return process.
returns.internationalProcess: Please contact our customer service team for guidance on international returns before shipping any items back to us.
returns.contactText: If you have any questions about returns or exchanges, our customer service team is here to help.

step1.name: Initiate Return
step1.description: Start your return through our online portal

step2.name: Package Items
step2.description: Securely pack your items with original packaging

step3.name: Ship Back
step3.description: Use our prepaid return label to send items back

step4.name: Get Refunded
step4.description: Receive your refund once we process the return

returnableItems.title: Eligible for Return
returnableItems.item1: Unworn, unwashed clothing with tags attached
returnableItems.item3: Unopened beauty and personal care items
returnableItems.item5: Items in original condition with all parts included

nonReturnableItems.title: Not Eligible for Return
nonReturnableItems.item3: Items marked as 'Final Sale' or clearance
nonReturnableItems.item4: Items without original packaging or tags

exchanges.title: Exchanges
exchanges.description: We're happy to help you exchange items for a different size or color, subject to availability.
exchanges.requestDescription: Follow these steps to exchange an item:
exchanges.step1: Log in to your account and go to 'Order History'
exchanges.step2: Select the item you want to exchange and choose 'Exchange' as the return reason
exchanges.step4: Print the return label and send back the original item
exchanges.step5: Once we receive your return, we'll ship your replacement
exchanges.processDescription: Please note that exchanges are subject to stock availability. If your preferred replacement is not available, we'll issue a refund instead.
exchanges.eligibilityDescription: To be eligible for an exchange, your item must meet the following criteria:
exchanges.eligibility1: Item must be unused, unworn, and in original condition with all tags attached
exchanges.eligibility3: Exchange must be requested within 14 days of delivery
exchanges.eligibility4: Item must be in stock for exchange
exchanges.priceDiffDescription: If the replacement item is more expensive, you'll be charged the difference. If it's less expensive, we'll refund the difference to your original payment method.
exchanges.internationalDescription: International customers are responsible for return shipping costs and any applicable customs duties or taxes for the returned item. We'll cover the cost of shipping the replacement item to you.

process.title: Our Return Process
process.timeline1: Day 1-2: Initiate return and receive return label
process.timeline2: Day 3-5: Package and ship your return
process.timeline3: Day 6-10: We receive and inspect your return
process.shippingText1: We provide a prepaid return label for US returns. International customers are responsible for return shipping costs.
process.shippingText2: For your protection, we recommend using a trackable shipping service and purchasing shipping insurance.
process.refundText1: Refunds are processed within 3-5 business days after we receive your return.
process.refundText2: The refund will be credited to your original method of payment.
process.refundText3: Please allow additional time for your bank or credit card company to process the refund.
process.helpText: If you have any questions about our return process, please contact our customer service team.

sellers.title: Become a Seller
sellers.subtitle: Join our marketplace and showcase your products to customers worldwide
sellers.heroText: Connect with customers around the world and grow your business on our trusted platform for Moroccan fashion and handicrafts.
sellers.benefit1Text: Access customers worldwide with our international shipping and multi-language support.
sellers.benefit2Text: Create your seller profile and list products quickly with our intuitive dashboard.
sellers.benefit3Text: Receive payments securely with our trusted payment processing system.
sellers.benefit4Text: Get dedicated support for all your selling needs, from product listings to shipping assistance.
sellers.step1Text: Register for a seller account on pro.beldify.com and complete your profile with your business information.
sellers.step2Text: Upload your product catalog with photos, descriptions, pricing, and inventory information.
sellers.step3Text: Get notified when customers place orders for your products.
sellers.step4Text: Ship orders to customers and receive payments directly to your account.
sellers.testimonial1Text: Since joining Beldify, my caftan sales have increased by 70%. The platform has helped me reach customers in Europe and the Middle East that I couldn't access before.
sellers.testimonial2Text: The seller dashboard makes it easy for me to manage my inventory and track orders. The support team has been incredibly helpful with all my questions.
sellers.testimonial3Text: Beldify has transformed my small business into an international brand. The exposure to global customers has been invaluable for growth.

sellerFaqs.question: How much does it cost to sell on Beldify?
sellerFaqs.answer: Registration is free. We charge a 10% commission on each sale, which includes payment processing. There are no monthly fees or listing fees.

sellerFaqs.question: How and when do I get paid?
sellerFaqs.answer: Payments are processed every two weeks for all completed orders. You can receive payments via bank transfer or other supported payment methods in your country.

sellerFaqs.question: Do I need to handle shipping?
sellerFaqs.answer: Yes, sellers are responsible for shipping their products. We provide shipping guidelines and integration with major carriers to make the process easier.

sellerFaqs.question: What products can I sell on Beldify?
sellerFaqs.answer: We focus on Moroccan fashion, accessories, home décor, and handicrafts. All products must be authentic and comply with our marketplace standards.

sellers.registerText: Join thousands of successful sellers on our platform and take your business to the next level.

newsletter.title: Stay Updated
newsletter.subtitle: Subscribe to our newsletter for exclusive offers, new arrivals, and traditional Moroccan fashion inspiration.

footer.description: Discover the finest Moroccan fashion and handicrafts. Beldify connects you with authentic Moroccan artisans and designers.

size_guide.title: Size Guide for Traditional Moroccan Clothing
size_guide.description: Find your perfect fit for caftans, jabadors, and other traditional Moroccan garments
size_guide.chest_bust_desc: Measure around the fullest part of your chest/bust, keeping the tape parallel to the ground
size_guide.waist_desc: Measure around your natural waistline, at the smallest part of your waist
size_guide.hip_desc: Measure around the fullest part of your hips, keeping the tape parallel to the ground
size_guide.shoulder_desc: Measure across the back from shoulder point to shoulder point
size_guide.top_length_desc: Measure from the shoulder to the desired length of the Jabador top
size_guide.inseam_desc: Measure from the crotch to the bottom of the ankle
size_guide.pants_length_desc: Measure from the waist to the bottom of the ankle
size_guide.length_desc: For caftans and jabadors, measure from the shoulder to the desired length. Traditional lengths vary by garment type
size_guide.length_note_caftan: * Caftan lengths typically range from 150cm to 170cm for adults, and 85cm to 130cm for kids
size_guide.length_note_jabador: * Jabador comes in two pieces with varying lengths based on age and gender

length_note_kandora.men: * Men's Kandora lengths typically range from 130cm to 150cm
length_note_kandora.women: * Women's Kandora lengths typically range from 130cm to 150cm
length_note_kandora.kids: * Kids' Kandora lengths range from 80cm to 105cm based on age

size_guide.sleeve_desc: Measure from shoulder to wrist with arm slightly bent
size_guide.tip_1: Traditional Moroccan clothing is typically loose-fitting for comfort
size_guide.tip_2: For Jabador, ensure both top and pants measurements for the perfect fit
size_guide.tip_3: Allow room for layering with traditional undergarments
size_guide.tip_4: For kids' sizes, consider growth room when choosing measurements
size_guide.contact_support: Contact our expert tailors for custom measurements and alterations
size_guide.no_measurements: No measurements available for this garment type

garment_description.caftan: Traditional floor-length garment with elegant flowing design
garment_description.jabador: Two-piece traditional outfit with a top and pants
garment_description.kandora: Traditional ankle-length garment, shorter than a caftan

hero.headline: Worn for centuries.
hero.body: Discover caftans, djellabas, and tailoring from Morocco's finest ateliers — delivered worldwide.

brand.name: Beldify
brand.etymologySubtitle: beldi (بلدي) — local, artisan, of the country

openSouk.headline: Post your brief. Ateliers come to you.
openSouk.subtitle: A reverse marketplace where Tetouani ateliers compete to make your piece.
openSouk.aiTranslateChip: AI translates your brief to AR · EN · FR
openSouk.feedEmptyBody: Be the first to post a brief — ateliers are watching.
openSouk.helperBody: A reverse marketplace where you post a tailoring brief and ateliers send you offers. AI translates everything to the right language.
openSouk.helperStep2: Add a title, description, and budget
openSouk.helperStep3: Add reference photos so ateliers know what you want
openSouk.helperStep5: Publish and ateliers will message you with offers
openSouk.helperTip: Tip: the more detail you give, the better the offers you'll receive.

categories.description: Explore caftans, djellabas, and bespoke tailoring — organised by tradition, gender, and craft.

termsOfService.intro: Welcome to Beldify. These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Beldify website, services, and applications (collectively, the "Services"). By accessing or using our Services, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
termsOfService.pleaseRead: Please read these Terms carefully before using our Services. If you do not agree to these Terms, you may not access or use the Services.
termsOfService.section1p1: To access certain features of our Services, you may be required to register for an account. When you register, you agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information and to update this information to maintain its accuracy. You are responsible for safeguarding your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
termsOfService.section1p2: You must be at least 16 years of age to use our Services. If you are under the age of 18, you must have your parent or guardian's permission to use our Services.
termsOfService.section2Intro: When using our Services, you agree not to:
termsOfService.conduct1: Violate any applicable laws or regulations
termsOfService.conduct2: Infringe upon the rights of others, including privacy and intellectual property rights
termsOfService.conduct3: Use our Services to distribute unsolicited commercial messages (spam)
termsOfService.conduct4: Upload or transmit viruses, malware, or other harmful code
termsOfService.conduct5: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems or user accounts
termsOfService.conduct6: Interfere with or disrupt our Services or servers
termsOfService.conduct8: Engage in any activity that could disable, overburden, or impair the proper functioning of our Services
termsOfService.conduct9: Collect or harvest user information without consent
termsOfService.conduct10: Use our Services for any illegal or unauthorized purpose
termsOfService.section3p1: All product descriptions, images, and prices are subject to change without notice. We reserve the right to limit quantities, refuse orders, or discontinue products at our discretion. We make reasonable efforts to display accurate colors and descriptions, but we cannot guarantee that your device's display accurately reflects the actual colors of products.
termsOfService.section3p2: When you place an order through our Services, you are making an offer to purchase the products in your cart. We reserve the right to accept or decline your offer for any reason, including product availability, errors in product information or pricing, or suspected fraudulent activity.
termsOfService.section4p1: Beldify provides a platform for sellers to offer their products to buyers. Sellers are independent third parties, and we are not responsible for their products, actions, or omissions. While we strive to ensure a safe and reliable marketplace, we cannot guarantee the quality, safety, or legality of products sold by third-party sellers.
termsOfService.section4p2: For sellers using our platform, additional terms apply. Please refer to the Seller Terms available at
termsOfService.section5p1: By providing payment information, you represent and warrant that you have the legal right to use the payment method you provide. You authorize us to charge your payment method for the total amount of your order, including applicable taxes, shipping fees, and any other charges stated at checkout.
termsOfService.section5p2: All prices are displayed in your selected currency and do not include taxes or shipping costs unless otherwise specified. We reserve the right to correct pricing errors at any time before accepting your order.
termsOfService.section6p1: Shipping times and costs vary based on the delivery location, product availability, and selected shipping method. Estimated delivery dates are not guaranteed. For complete information about our shipping policies, please see our Shipping Information page.
termsOfService.section7p1: Our return and refund policies are outlined on our Returns page. By placing an order, you agree to these policies. We reserve the right to modify our return and refund policies at any time.
termsOfService.section8p1: The Services, including all content, features, and functionality, are owned by Beldify, its licensors, or other providers and are protected by copyright, trademark, patent, trade secret, and other intellectual property laws.
termsOfService.section8p2: You may not use, reproduce, distribute, modify, create derivative works of, publicly display, publicly perform, republish, download, store, or transmit any content from our Services, except as permitted by these Terms or with our prior written consent.
termsOfService.section9p1: By submitting content to our Services (such as reviews, comments, or posts in our community section), you grant Beldify a non-exclusive, royalty-free, perpetual, irrevocable, and fully sublicensable right to use, reproduce, modify, adapt, publish, translate, create derivative works from, distribute, and display such content throughout the world in any media.
termsOfService.section9p2: You represent and warrant that your content does not violate any third-party rights, including privacy, publicity, copyright, trademark, or other intellectual property rights, and that it complies with these Terms and all applicable laws and regulations.
termsOfService.section10p1: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, BELDIFY, ITS DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, PARTNERS, AGENTS, SUPPLIERS, OR AFFILIATES SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION, LOSS OF PROFITS, DATA, USE, GOODWILL, OR OTHER INTANGIBLE LOSSES, RESULTING FROM YOUR ACCESS TO OR USE OF OR INABILITY TO ACCESS OR USE THE SERVICES.
termsOfService.section11p1: THE SERVICES ARE PROVIDED ON AN "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" BASIS, WITHOUT ANY WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED. BELDIFY DISCLAIMS ALL WARRANTIES, INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT.
termsOfService.section12p1: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Beldify, its affiliates, officers, directors, employees, agents, licensors, and suppliers from and against any claims, liabilities, damages, judgments, awards, losses, costs, expenses, or fees (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising out of or relating to your violation of these Terms or your use of the Services.
termsOfService.section13p1: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Morocco, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any legal action or proceeding arising out of or relating to these Terms shall be brought exclusively in the courts located in Morocco.
termsOfService.section14p1: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. When we make changes, we will update the "Last updated" date at the top of these Terms and, in some cases, provide additional notice. Your continued use of our Services after we post modifications to the Terms constitutes your acceptance of those changes.
termsOfService.section15p1: We may terminate or suspend your account and access to our Services immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason, including, without limitation, if you breach these Terms. Upon termination, your right to use the Services will immediately cease.
termsOfService.section16Intro: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:

tailors.heroSubtitle: Discover our network of master tailors who create bespoke garments with precision and artistry
tailors.noResults: No tailors found matching your criteria.

tailorDetail.description: With over 15 years of experience, we specialize in creating bespoke garments that perfectly fit your style and physique. Our commitment to quality and traditional techniques ensures every piece is a masterpiece.
tailorDetail.address: 123 Rue Mohammed V, Quartier Anfa, Casablanca
tailorDetail.review1Comment: Exceptional craftsmanship and attention to detail.
tailorDetail.review2Comment: Great quality work and professional service.

about.headline: Crafted in Morocco,
about.sub: Beldify was founded by a small team with deep roots in Morocco's artisan communities. Our mission: make authentic Moroccan tailoring and fashion accessible to the world — fairly, beautifully, without compromise.

craftsmanship.title: Craftsmanship first
craftsmanship.body: Every piece on Beldify is hand-finished by a verified Moroccan artisan. We work directly with ateliers in Fez, Marrakech, Casablanca and Tetouan to ensure the traditions of zellige stitching, brocade weaving and hand-embroidery survive another generation.
craftsmanship.imageAlt: A tailor working on a djellaba in a Fez atelier

fairTrade.title: Fair trade, transparent prices
fairTrade.body: We publish our commission rates openly (10–15 %) and pay sellers bi-weekly. No hidden fees, no race to the bottom on price. When you buy on Beldify, the artisan receives a living wage and keeps full creative control.
fairTrade.imageAlt: A seller reviewing an order on a phone

tailoring.title: Bespoke tailoring, made simple
tailoring.body: Our guided measurement form and video call option mean you never need to set foot in a medina to get a piece fitted perfectly. Pick your tailor, share your measurements, receive your garment in 2–4 weeks.
tailoring.imageAlt: Measuring tape on a caftan fabric

community.title: A community, not just a marketplace
community.body: Beldify started as a WhatsApp group between three friends who were tired of seeing their grandmothers' atelier struggle to reach customers abroad. Today we are a platform connecting 120+ ateliers with shoppers in 23 cities worldwide — and growing.

cta.headline: Ready to explore?
cta.sub: Browse verified ateliers, discover new arrivals, or start a bespoke tailoring order today.

faqs.headline: Frequently asked.
faqs.sub: Quick answers — or write us if you don't find yours.

0.question: Does Beldify ship internationally?
0.answer: Yes. Beldify ships to most countries worldwide. Shipping costs and delivery times vary by destination. Standard international delivery takes 7–14 business days.

1.question: What are the shipping options within Morocco?
1.answer: We offer standard delivery (5–7 business days) and express delivery (2–3 business days) within Morocco. Orders over 500 MAD qualify for free standard shipping.

2.question: How do I track my order?
2.answer: Once your order ships, you'll receive a confirmation email with a tracking link. You can also check your order status in the Orders section of your account.

0.question: What is your return policy?
0.answer: We accept returns within 14 days of delivery for unworn items in original condition with tags attached. Custom-made pieces cannot be returned unless there is a manufacturing defect.

1.question: How do I start a return?
1.answer: Log in, go to Orders, select the relevant order and follow the return instructions. Our team will issue a return label or reimburse reasonable return shipping costs for defective items.

2.question: How long do refunds take?
2.answer: We process refunds within 3–5 business days of receiving the return. Allow an additional 3–10 business days for your bank to reflect the credit.

0.question: How does bespoke tailoring work on Beldify?
0.answer: Browse verified tailors, select one, fill in our guided measurement form (or book a video call), and confirm your order. Expect delivery in 2–4 weeks.

1.question: Can I customise fabric, colour, or embroidery?
1.answer: Yes. Each tailor page lists customisation options. Availability and pricing vary; most ateliers can accommodate fabric swaps and embroidery preferences.

2.question: What if the garment does not fit?
2.answer: We offer one free alteration round on all bespoke orders. Contact us within 7 days of delivery and we will coordinate with the tailor.

0.question: How do I become a seller on Beldify?
0.answer: Apply at beldify.com/seller/register. We review each application for authenticity and craft quality, then onboard accepted sellers within 3–5 business days.

1.question: What commission does Beldify charge?
1.answer: Commission ranges from 10% to 15% depending on product category. There are no listing fees, setup fees, or monthly subscriptions.

2.question: When do sellers get paid?
2.answer: Payments are deposited bi-weekly after accounting for the 14-day return window. We support bank transfers and mobile money.

0.question: Do I need an account to buy?
0.answer: No — guest checkout is available. Creating an account gives you order history, faster checkout, saved addresses, and wishlist access.

1.question: What payment methods are accepted?
1.answer: Visa, Mastercard, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and bank transfer. Cash on delivery is available for certain areas within Morocco.

2.question: How do I reset my password?
2.answer: Click "Forgot password" on the login page. We will email you a reset link that is valid for 30 minutes.

faqs.contactText: Our team is one message away.

contact.headline: We're here to help.
contact.sub: Our team answers every message personally. Expect a reply within one business day.

form.heading: Send us a message
form.subject: Subject
form.thankYou: Thank you — we'll be in touch soon!

offline.title: You're Offline
offline.body: It looks like you've lost your internet connection. Don't worry, you can still browse some previously viewed content.
offline.footnote: Once you're back online, all features will be available again.
